title.description: A title of the litter's advert

description.description: A brief description about the advert, the pets and the mother

advert_type.description: The type of advert. Present the human-readable label to the user during conversation, but always submit the corresponding dot-notation code value listed below. Mapping (display name → code):   For Sale         → pets.dogs.forSale   Stud Dog         → pets.dogs.studDog   Wanted           → pets.dogs.wanted   Rescue / Rehome  → pets.dogs.rescueRehome

breed.description: The breed of the pet. Present the human-readable breed name to the user during conversation, but always submit the corresponding dot-notation code value listed below. Mapping (display name → code):   Labrador Retriever         → pets.dogs.forSale.labradorRetriever   Golden Retriever           → pets.dogs.forSale.goldenRetriever   French Bulldog             → pets.dogs.forSale.frenchBulldog   German Shepherd            → pets.dogs.forSale.germanShepherd   Bulldog                    → pets.dogs.forSale.bulldog   Poodle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.poodle   Beagle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.beagle   Rottweiler                 → pets.dogs.forSale.rottweiler   Yorkshire Terrier          → pets.dogs.forSale.yorkshireTerrier   Dachshund                  → pets.dogs.forSale.dachshund   Boxer                      → pets.dogs.forSale.boxer   Siberian Husky             → pets.dogs.forSale.siberianHusky   Shih Tzu                   → pets.dogs.forSale.shihTzu   Border Collie              → pets.dogs.forSale.borderCollie   Cavalier King Charles Spaniel → pets.dogs.forSale.cavalierKingCharlesSpaniel

mother_breed.description: The breed of the mother. Present the human-readable breed name to the user during conversation, but always submit the corresponding dot-notation code value listed below. Mapping (display name → code):   Labrador Retriever         → pets.dogs.forSale.labradorRetriever   Golden Retriever           → pets.dogs.forSale.goldenRetriever   French Bulldog             → pets.dogs.forSale.frenchBulldog   German Shepherd            → pets.dogs.forSale.germanShepherd   Bulldog                    → pets.dogs.forSale.bulldog   Poodle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.poodle   Beagle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.beagle   Rottweiler                 → pets.dogs.forSale.rottweiler   Yorkshire Terrier          → pets.dogs.forSale.yorkshireTerrier   Dachshund                  → pets.dogs.forSale.dachshund   Boxer                      → pets.dogs.forSale.boxer   Siberian Husky             → pets.dogs.forSale.siberianHusky   Shih Tzu                   → pets.dogs.forSale.shihTzu   Border Collie              → pets.dogs.forSale.borderCollie   Cavalier King Charles Spaniel → pets.dogs.forSale.cavalierKingCharlesSpaniel

father_breed.description: The breed of the father. Present the human-readable breed name to the user during conversation, but always submit the corresponding dot-notation code value listed below. Mapping (display name → code):   Labrador Retriever         → pets.dogs.forSale.labradorRetriever   Golden Retriever           → pets.dogs.forSale.goldenRetriever   French Bulldog             → pets.dogs.forSale.frenchBulldog   German Shepherd            → pets.dogs.forSale.germanShepherd   Bulldog                    → pets.dogs.forSale.bulldog   Poodle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.poodle   Beagle                     → pets.dogs.forSale.beagle   Rottweiler                 → pets.dogs.forSale.rottweiler   Yorkshire Terrier          → pets.dogs.forSale.yorkshireTerrier   Dachshund                  → pets.dogs.forSale.dachshund   Boxer                      → pets.dogs.forSale.boxer   Siberian Husky             → pets.dogs.forSale.siberianHusky   Shih Tzu                   → pets.dogs.forSale.shihTzu   Border Collie              → pets.dogs.forSale.borderCollie   Cavalier King Charles Spaniel → pets.dogs.forSale.cavalierKingCharlesSpaniel

number_of_males.description: Number of male pets in the litter

number_of_females.description: Number of female pets in the litter

date_of_birth.description: When were all pets born? User can add a date in any format, but the output should be always in ISO8601 date with UTC timezone

price.description: The asking price for each pet in GBP (pounds sterling). Ask the user for the price per puppy.

deposit_amount.description: The deposit amount required to reserve a pet in GBP (pounds sterling). Ask the user for the deposit amount.
